description_long: This object is a compact assault rifle with a black metal receiver and a folding wire stock, reminiscent of the AKS-74U design. The handguard and magazine are made of wood or a wood-like material, giving it a classic yet rugged appearance. The rifle features a short barrel with a prominent flash hider at the muzzle, and standard iron sights are mounted along the top. The magazine is curved and detachable, typical for rifles of this type, and the trigger guard and pistol grip are clearly visible. The folding stock is skeletal, designed for portability and ease of storage. The overall finish is a mix of matte black metal and polished brown wood, with visible mechanical details such as the charging handle and safety lever.
description: A compact black assault rifle with a folding wire stock, wooden handguard, and curved wooden magazine, featuring iron sights and a short barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the folding stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden handguard, curved magazine, folding wire stock, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the folding stock and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, handguard, and the folding stock from the other side.
